title: Chewy Japanese Basil Sushi
description: A fresh, bitter, energizing sushi roll with crisp basil and a hint of tandoor spice, perfect for a quick snack or light meal. Whole30-friendly and naturally gluten-free.

ingredients.name: tandoor spice blend
ingredients.notes: mild spice mix for subtle heat

ingredients.name: sushi vinegar
ingredients.notes: use rice vinegar for authentic flavor

instructions: Rinse sushi rice under cold water until water runs clear.
Cook rice according to package instructions (15 mins at 100°C).
Mix sushi vinegar, sugar, and salt in a small bowl.
Add cooked rice to vinegar mixture and stir until fully coated.
In a clean bowl, place fresh basil leaves on top of the rice mixture.
Sprinkle tandoor spice blend over the basil leaves.
Let sit for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled for maximum crispness and chew.
